title: erigeron eatonii var. nevadincola
intro: Erigeron eatonii var. nevadincola, also known as the Nevada daisy, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. It is a member of the daisy family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Erigeron eatonii var. nevadincola include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or oil.
